form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr4) over 1690m at Kilmore beaten 35 m by Olly Odd Potts (2:07.80) in NR up to 35 on April 2 at $16. Before that 7th (Fr1) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 17 m by Bettorsweetvictory (1:59.10) in NR up to 40 on March 25 at $51. Would rather see in something easier.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Bond Girl at Cranbourne over 1609m in a NR up to 39 on April 3 at $4. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.5 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Precious Belle at Ballarat over 2200m in a NR 38 to 42 on April 9 at $21. Nicely placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Back in form at the last couple of outings, two starts back won by 1.75 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr6) at Kilmore (2:43.70) beating Theroux in NR 36 to 40 on April 2 at $1.70 at the bell was leading 8.79. Last start just missed, game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 2200m after showing early speed at Ballarat was 2nd-0.67 at the bell, beaten 1.5 m by Precious Belle (2:43.00) in NR 38 to 42 on April 9 at $1.40. Looks the testing material.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr1) over 1710m at Ballarat beaten 25 m by Aveiro (2:01.90) in NR 43 to 48 on April 9 at $26. Two runs back surrendered the lead and finished 2nd (Fr2) over 2180m after showing early speed at Stawell, at the bell was 5th-8.2 beaten 3.5 m by Lester (2:42.90) in NR 40 to 45 on April 3 at $9.50. Can't see her troubling these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Offside sulky wheel was contacted by Glenflyer near the 500m.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Aveiro at Ballarat over 1710m in a NR 43 to 48 on April 9 at $3.50. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr5) over 1785m after racing wide at Stawell was 2nd-1.8 at the bell, beaten a neck by Optimal (2:11.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 3 at $4.60. Strong winning prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running over the latter stages.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth behind Huxham Chubb at Terang over 1680m in a NR up to 45 on March 27 at $23. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second behind Loan Sailor at Stawell over 1785m in a NR up to 40 on April 3 at $8.50. Has the ability to play a major role.
